evals.prompt: Copy evals/fixtures/valid-skills.yaml to skills.yaml and evals/fixtures/valid-skills-lock.yaml to skills-lock.yaml in the skill directory, then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: Both files validate successfully with exit code 0

evals.prompt: Copy evals/fixtures/valid-skills.yaml to skills.yaml in the skill directory. Ensure there is no skills-lock.yaml file. Then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: skills.yaml validates, lockfile is skipped as optional, exit code 0

evals.prompt: Copy evals/fixtures/invalid-skills-bad-url.yaml to skills.yaml in the skill directory. Then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: Validation fails with schema error for skills.yaml, exit code 1
expectations: Output does NOT contain 'All files valid'

evals.prompt: Copy evals/fixtures/valid-skills.yaml to skills.yaml and evals/fixtures/invalid-lock-short-hash.yaml to skills-lock.yaml in the skill directory. Then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: Validation fails with schema error for skills-lock.yaml (commit hash too short), exit code 1
expectations: Output does NOT contain 'All files valid'

evals.prompt: Create an empty skills.yaml file (0 bytes) in the skill directory. Then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: Validation fails because file is empty, exit code 1
expectations: Output does NOT contain 'All files valid'

evals.prompt: Ensure there is no skills.yaml file in the skill directory. Then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: Validation fails because required file not found, exit code 1
expectations: Output does NOT contain 'All files valid'

evals.prompt: Copy evals/fixtures/valid-skills.yaml to skills.yaml. Create a skills-lock.yaml with an unquoted timestamp: 'installed: 2026-03-14T07:18:30+01:00' (without quotes). Then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: Validation fails because YAML auto-parses the unquoted timestamp as datetime instead of string, exit code 1
expectations: Output does NOT contain 'All files valid'

evals.prompt: Copy evals/fixtures/valid-skills.yaml to skills.yaml and evals/fixtures/invalid-lock-missing-field.yaml to skills-lock.yaml in the skill directory. Then run python3 scripts/validate_skills.py
evals.expected_output: Validation fails because lockfile is missing the required 'branch' field, exit code 1
expectations: Output does NOT contain 'All files valid'
